transcript.content: 已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case
继续扩 harder cases，把类似 GC-B 的自然中文多轮切题也收进固定回归

已经把 harder case 补进固定回归了。 新增 case： - `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return` - 文件：[evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
要；尽量不是白名单，有硬编码嫌疑；
已经收住了，而且不是靠白名单。 我做了两步： - 把中文多轮切题 harder case 收进固定回归 - 再把 packaged guard 收紧成“不能覆盖 shadow guard 的否决”
那刚才不通过的测试，可以重新测试，预期是可以通过了对么？
能自动跑的，你帮我跑一遍
我已经替你自动跑了一遍： ```bash node scripts/eval-codex-context-minor-gc-live.js --format markdown ```

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains the Codex minor GC harder-case/regression work. Prior turns cover adding tougher Chinese multitopic live eval cases, avoiding whitelist-style hardcoding, tightening packaged guard behavior, and rerunning the previously failing automated eval with the expectation it now passes.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn ('继续') stays on the same active implementation/testing thread. The next turn still depends on recent raw context about the harder cases, non-whitelist constraint, and the rerunable test status, so this is not a switch or resolve. No older turns should be evicted yet because the active task is still in progress and the immediate continuation may rely on that evidence.
